buttons.primary: bg-[#0B0F19] text-white hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all duration-300 ease-out rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0B0F19] border border-[#0B0F19] hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-300 ease-out rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-[#0B0F19] hover:text-[#00C2E0] transition-colors duration-300 ease-out font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-2
rules: Never use teal for primary CTA background. Teal is for accents and text highlights only.
Add an arrow icon (lucide-react) to primary and ghost buttons that translates slightly on hover.

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
cards.dark: bg-[#0B0F19] border border-slate-800 p-8 text-white hover:border-slate-600 transition-colors duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm p-8

inputs.default: border-b border-slate-300 bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:border-[#0B0F19] focus:ring-0 transition-colors placeholder:text-slate-400

rules: Use optical alignment: ensure icons in buttons are visually centered.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).
Leave negative space around the hero section. Do not cram content.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations. Fade up and slight translate-y.
motion_and_interaction.hover: Cards should have a subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and increased shadow. Buttons must have clear hover state contrast changes.
motion_and_interaction.lifecycle_diagram: Build a 4-stage interactive diagram using Framer Motion. Clicking a stage expands its details while collapsing others (accordion or tabs style but visual).
motion_and_interaction.sticky_cta: Implement a bottom sticky bar that appears after scrolling past the hero section, offering a persistent 'Book a Call' CTA.

hero.description: Stark white background with massive typographic statement. High-contrast.
hero.background: White, maybe with subtle floating UI elements or the abstract tech image with high opacity overlay.

problem_statement.description: Dark section (#0B0F19) to create tension. Highlights the pain points of fragmented platforms.
problem_statement.layout: Grid with big typography on left, drawbacks listed on right with red/warning accents for the problem.

solution.description: Transition back to light. Clean, authoritative statement.
solution.layout: Center-aligned massive text followed by bento grid cards.

lifecycle_diagram.description: Interactive component showing Ingest -> Transform -> Govern -> Serve.
lifecycle_diagram.layout: Horizontal or vertical interactive timeline using Framer Motion.

differentiators.layout: Grid with icons (lucide-react). Use 'The Tracing Beam' or subtle grid borders here.

use_cases.description: Pills or chips layout for the 5 strategic use cases.
use_cases.layout: Flex wrap with large outline chips that fill on hover.

proof_of_impact.layout: 4 columns. Massive numbers using 'Outfit' font, light weight.

final_cta.layout: Center aligned, very simple, large CTA buttons.

hero_bg.description: Abstract 3D render of digital blocks to be used very subtly as a background element or mask.

logo_1.description: To be used if placeholder logos are needed for customer proof.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Implement the lead capture modal using a dialog component that sends data to a mock Google Sheets backend (console.log the payload).
Add placeholder scripts for Google Ads conversion tracking in the index.html or as useEffect hooks when the form submits.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' from Google Fonts. Import it in index.html.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
The lifecycle diagram must be interactive. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence to show/hide stage details.
Strictly follow the color rules: No Teal for CTA buttons. CTAs must be Obsidian/Dark Navy.
